headline: Swiss army pushes VAT-funded route to its rearmament target
summary: Defence chief Pfister advances a dedicated VAT rise to fund the army, the third earmarking claim on VAT after pensions and rail.

headline: June heat record in Valais: Visp hits 36.3C
summary: Visp records its all-time June high of 36.3C during a national heatwave.

headline: Swiss glaciers have already exhausted winter snow reserves in June
summary: Many Swiss glaciers have lost their protective winter snowpack, exposing bare ice to melt in the first June heatwave.

headline: Federal Council says no new budget cuts needed for 2027
summary: Swiss government concludes no further savings package is required to balance the 2027 federal accounts.

headline: Particle physicist Guenther Dissertori named next ETH Zurich president
summary: CMS/CERN physicist Dissertori will become president of ETH Zurich next year.

headline: Rubio: Iran cannot charge tolls in Strait of Hormuz under any deal
summary: US says no Hormuz transit fees in any Iran agreement; Tehran claims fee rights; Japan weighs minesweeping deployment.

headline: US Senate passes Iran war-powers resolution rebuking Trump
summary: Senate votes to force Trump to halt the Iran campaign or seek authorization; four Republicans cross over; first chamber passage this cycle.

headline: Israeli strikes kill two in southern Lebanon despite Washington talks
summary: Israeli attacks kill two in south Lebanon amid US-mediated talks, another violation of the 19 June ceasefire.

headline: North Korea commissions warship as Kim eyes nuclear navy
summary: Pyongyang commissions a new surface combatant amid Kim's nuclear-navy push, building on the 10,000-tonne destroyer ordered in June.

headline: Ukraine Recovery Conference opens in Gdansk amid Kyiv-Warsaw memory row
summary: URC opens in Gdansk shadowed by a Ukraine-Poland historical-memory dispute.

headline: Continent-wide heatwave brings deaths and disruption across Europe
summary: Heatwave causes deaths and transport disruption across Europe; Paris briefly hotter than Mecca.

headline: Critical OS command-injection RCE in Google Gemini CLI (CVE-2026-12537)
summary: CVSS 10 pre-sandbox host RCE via crafted .gemini/.env in Gemini CLI <0.39.1 and run-gemini-cli action <0.1.22.

headline: Unauthenticated RCE in Feast ML feature store via dill.loads (CVE-2026-56121)
summary: CVSS 9.3 unsafe deserialization in Feast registry gRPC enables unauthenticated RCE before 0.63.0.

headline: GeoVision GV-I/O Box 4E critical command-injection CVEs (Talos)
summary: Cisco Talos discloses multiple CVSS-10 OS command-injection and overflow flaws in GeoVision GV-I/O Box 4E via UDP port 10001.

headline: CISA adds three Ubiquiti UniFi OS flaws to KEV catalog
summary: CVE-2026-34908/34909/34910 added to CISA KEV for active exploitation on 23 June; Lantronix EDS5000 also added.

headline: Persistent RCE in Anthropic Claude Desktop Cowork VM image handling (CVE-2026-7574)
summary: Local attacker can tamper with unverified Cowork VM rootfs image for persistent code execution (CVSS 8.7, local).

headline: CrossPool: disaggregating KV-cache and weights for cold MoE serving
summary: Shared KV-cache pool plus weight disaggregation cuts GPU memory waste when serving many cold MoE models.

headline: AsyncOPD: how stale can on-policy distillation be?
summary: First systematic study of staleness tolerance in asynchronous on-policy distillation for LLM post-training.

headline: Grad Detect: gradient-based hallucination detection in LLMs
summary: Layer-wise gradients from a single backward pass predict LLM hallucinations beyond output-level signals.

headline: Reasoning as attractor dynamics in LLM energy landscapes
summary: Frames correct reasoning as flat-minima attractors in a dense associative memory, retrieved via Gibbs-weighted spectral entropy.

headline: Holistic Data Scheduler: multi-objective RL for LLM pre-training data mixing
summary: Online data-mixing framework casting the blend choice as multi-objective reinforcement learning.
